label: L8.9 real external FDTD run ingestion bundled fixtures

fixtures.label: Transparent real-run fixture
fixtures.purpose: Pass-path receipt, flux, field slice, energy balance, postprocess log, comparison, and promotion smoke.

fixtures.label: Aperture/blocker real-run fixture
fixtures.purpose: Warning-tolerant finite aperture/blocker external-run-style evidence with field/intensity preview.

fixtures.label: Hash-mismatch warning fixture
fixtures.purpose: Intentional material, monitor, and run-config hash mismatch fixture that must fail validation.

boundary: Fixtures are deterministic diagnostic evidence for import-contract and UI validation.
They are not measured lab results, certified solver validation, browser FDTD execution, arbitrary 3D Maxwell/FEM/BEM/RCWA execution, digital twins, or manufacturing certification.
